description: User scrolls down through the initial flight search results for Brisbane to London.
frame_description: The user is viewing a list of flight search results and begins scrolling down to see more options.

description: User clicks on the '1 more flight option' link for a Qatar Airways result.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the '1 more flight option' link and a click is performed.

description: The flight result card expands to show an additional flight option.
frame_description: The UI responds to the click by expanding the flight result section to reveal more content.

description: User continues scrolling down the results list.
frame_description: The user scrolls further down the page, passing several flight result cards.

description: User pauses the cursor over the 'View Details' button of a Qatar Airways flight.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the 'View Details' button before the user decides to click.

description: User clicks the 'View Details' button to see the full itinerary.
frame_description: The user activates the 'View Details' button with a click.

description: The flight itinerary details expand within the result card.
frame_description: The flight card expands vertically to display the detailed flight itinerary.

description: User scrolls further down to see more results.
frame_description: The user scrolls down the page, looking at various airline options.

description: User moves the cursor to the airline filters on the left sidebar and hovers over 'Virgin Australia'.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the sidebar and pauses over the Virgin Australia checkbox.

description: User clicks the checkbox for 'Virgin Australia' to filter the search results.
frame_description: The user selects the Virgin Australia filter by clicking the checkbox.

description: The results list refreshes with a loading overlay to apply the filter.
frame_description: A loading spinner or overlay appears over the results as the page updates based on the new filter.

description: User scrolls through the filtered results.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to view the flights that match the Virgin Australia filter.

description: User hovers over the 'FASTEST' sorting tab at the top of the results.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the sorting options and lingers over the 'FASTEST' tab.

description: User clicks the 'FASTEST' sort tab.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'FASTEST' tab to re-sort the flight results.

description: The results are re-ordered based on flight duration.
frame_description: The flight results list updates and re-orders to show the fastest flights at the top.

description: User scrolls down to find the fastest flights.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to inspect the newly sorted flight options.

description: User hovers over 'View Details' for an Emirates flight.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'View Details' button for an Emirates flight result.

description: User clicks to see Emirates flight details.
frame_description: The user clicks the button to expand the Emirates flight details.

description: Emirates flight details expand.
frame_description: The Emirates flight card expands to show the itinerary details.

description: User scrolls down to the bottom of the current results.
frame_description: The user scrolls towards the bottom of the page.

description: User scrolls back up towards the top of the page.
frame_description: The user performs a rapid scroll back up the page.

description: User pauses for several seconds over the Qatar Airways 'View Details' button, suggesting uncertainty or careful consideration.
frame_description: The cursor remains stationary over the 'View Details' button for a significant period.

description: User clicks 'View Details' for the Qatar Airways flight.
frame_description: The user finally clicks the 'View Details' button for the Qatar Airways flight.

description: Qatar Airways flight details expand.
frame_description: The Qatar Airways flight card expands to reveal the full itinerary.

description: User scrolls down within the expanded details section.
frame_description: The user scrolls slightly to see the bottom of the expanded flight details.

description: User hovers over the 'Select' button for the Qatar Airways flight.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and stays on the 'Select' button.

description: User clicks 'Select' to choose this flight.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Select' button to proceed with the booking.

description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'We are currently checking...'.
frame_description: A modal overlay appears on the screen indicating that the system is verifying the flight availability.

description: The browser redirects from the search results to the trip review page.
frame_description: The page content changes as the browser navigates to the next step in the booking process.

description: User scrolls down on the 'Review your trip' page to check the details.
frame_description: The user scrolls down the new page to review the flight summary and price breakdown.
